bead.title: FEAT-008 P11: real backend resolvers (swap Phase 2 stubs)
bead.description: Replace stubbed resolvers from Phase 2 with real implementations. queueSummary: scan bead tracker. pluginsList/pluginDetail: shell ddx install list --json + registry scan. personaBind: write .ddx/config.yaml persona_bindings. paletteSearch: path+title prefix + FTS, 50-result cap, no body indexing in first pass. efficacyRows/efficacyAttempts: aggregate kind:cost + kind:routing evidence events from closed beads; memoize per (project, filters, max_event_sequence); invalidate on new evidence. workerDispatch(kind: realign-specs|run-checks) stub return queued-worker is acceptable here; real execution is a follow-up bead.
bead.acceptance: No mock fallbacks remain; manual smoke test of each action works against a real DDx instance.

events.body:
BLOCK: `cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_feat008.go`, `PluginDispatch` returns `queued-plugin-...` without invoking any real plugin install/dispatch path or validating the requested action/scope.
BLOCK: `cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_feat008.go`, `ComparisonDispatch` returns `queued-comparison-...` from `time.Now()` and `len(arms)` only; no real comparison job/record is created.
REQUEST_CHANGES: `cli/internal/server/graphql/feat008_test.go`, `TestIntegration_FEAT008BackendOperations` smoke-calls `pluginDispatch` and `comparisonDispatch` but does not assert their returned IDs/states or verify any real DDx side effect.
